title: All Things Cursed
description: This mod lets you craft some questionable items. 15 recipes and 2 advancements. 0 items were added.
body: This mod adds many different recepies you can use to make some illegal things like the legendary unenchanted enchanted book, the not written written book, and the debug stick. There are a total of 15 recepies. This project was made possible by MCreator.
